creator: mac@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update ports:
- Window Maker version up to 0.50.2
- Original WPrefs.app/po/hr.po file broken, this ports replace it.
- Deleting ja_JP.SJIS support, because of it can't possible
- This ports not installed shared library libPropList and libwraster

Fix: I attache GZIP + UUENCODED ports patch.
When this patch apply, patches/patch-{a[ah],ba} size is 0, so remove it.

Thank you.

---
